text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Good day, Trainer! What a beautiful morning! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I had the most wonderful dream last night! There
was a big parade and everyone was in it, even the
fairies!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There were banshees, the Dullahan... Oh, and
púcaí as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly pull up information on the fairies she
mentioned... but I can't help thinking all the
results look incredibly creepy. Maybe it's just me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Perhaps they'll come out to play again
soon. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel somewhat unsettled, but at least Fine
Motion seems to have gotten some good rest.
